title: Potato: Fabrimized
description: An optimization modpack designed to boost FPS and minimize lag while maintaining good visuals.
body:
## Optimizing Modpack

_Potato: Fabrimized_ is a modpack that aims to boost FPS and minimize lag while providing good vanilla visuals. The modpack comes with a few resource packs, primarily for cosmetic enhancements (such as the Better Leaves resource pack), as well as a range of shaders with varying weights to choose from. This is the very first version of _Potato: Fabrimized_ and may contain some areas that require improvement.
